heading: TANGIBLE PERSONAL PROPERTY NOT PRODUCING INCOME
operative_text: A person is entitled to an exemption from taxation of all tangible personal property, other than manufactured homes, that the person owns and that is not held or used for production of income. This subsection does not exempt from taxation a structure that a person owns which is substantially affixed to real estate and is used or occupied as a residential dwelling.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: "Manufactured home" has the meaning assigned by Section 11.432.
